sections.title: A: Complete using the correct form of the verbs in the box

The manager has ...... to give us extra time for the project.

I ...... he'll remember to bring the tickets.

sections.title: B: Write one word in each gap
sections.instructions: Write one word in each gap.

items.sentence: ...... my view, this is the safest solution.
The kitchen is ...... a terrible mess after lunch.
She is ...... a lot of pressure before the exams.
If you lie again, you'll be ...... trouble.
The animals were not ...... any danger during the rescue.

sections.title: C: Key Word Transformation
sections.instructions: Complete each second sentence using the word given, so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence. Write between two and five words.

items.sentence:
We should throw away these broken chairs. **rid**
We should ...... these broken chairs.

I don't think students should use phones during lessons. **approve**
I don't ...... phones during lessons.

Do you think aliens exist? **believe**
Do you ...... aliens?

You need to solve this misunderstanding today. **sort**
You need to ...... today.

I'm afraid there isn't any coffee left. **run**
I'm afraid ...... coffee.

How do you handle difficult customers? **deal**
How do you ...... difficult customers?

If you're not careful, you'll drop it! **watch**
If you ...... , you'll drop it!

I wouldn't accept that offer if I were you. **advise**
I would ...... that offer.
We had the windows ...... yesterday.
She got her bike ...... at the repair shop.
They are going to have their kitchen ...... next week.
He is getting his phone screen ...... today.
Although the journey was long, ...... we enjoyed it.
The hotel was expensive; ...... , the service was excellent.
She is kind ...... well as intelligent.
I wrote everything down ...... I wouldn't forget it.
...... arriving late, he still heard most of the lecture.
I had my passport photo ...... yesterday.
He is not only helpful ...... also very patient.
They stayed inside ...... of the heavy rain.
She had her eyes ...... by a specialist.
...... it was difficult, they finished the task.
